channel.title: Abouts on A Little Ham Radio Site
channel.description: Recent content in Abouts on A Little Ham Radio Site

item.title: Bibliography
item.description:
Select bibliography

Here you’ll find a list of some of my work published elsewhere. It all pertains to amateur radio and adjacent topics, published under bylines using some combination of my name (Megan Miller) and/or call sign (KD3CPY).

Newsletters

The Blurb (Phil-Mont Mobile Radio Club)

YL Harmonics (Young Ladies Radio League)
